abort.wrong_account: You have to use the same account that was used to configure the integration.

error.network_error: The Mastodon instance was not found.
error.unknown: Unknown error occurred when connecting to the Mastodon instance.

data_description.access_token: The access token for the application created within your Mastodon account.
data_description.base_url: The URL of your Mastodon instance e.g. {example_url}.
data_description.client_id: The client key for the application created within your Mastodon account.
data_description.client_secret: The client secret for the application created within your Mastodon account.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed, please reauthenticate with Mastodon.

idempotency_key_too_short.message: Idempotency key must be at least 4 characters long.

options.unlisted: Unlisted - Public but not shown in public timelines

options.followers: Followers - Only accounts that follow you can quote this post
options.nobody: Nobody - No one but you can quote this post
options.public: Public - Anyone can quote this post

get_account.description: Gets information about a Mastodon account.

config_entry_id.description: Select the Mastodon instance to use to search.
config_entry_id.name: Mastodon instance

get_account.name: Get account

account_name.description: The Mastodon account username to mute (e.g. @user@instance).
account_name.name: Account name

config_entry_id.description: Select the Mastodon instance to mute this account on.
config_entry_id.name: Mastodon instance

duration.description: The duration to mute the account for (default: indefinitely).
duration.name: Duration

hide_notifications.description: Hide notifications from this account while muted.
hide_notifications.name: Hide notifications

post.description: Posts a status on your Mastodon account.

config_entry_id.description: Select the Mastodon account to post to.
config_entry_id.name: Mastodon account

content_warning.description: A content warning will be shown before the status text is shown (default: no content warning).
content_warning.name: Content warning

idempotency_key.description: A unique key for this post. If specified then subsequent posts with the same key will be ignored by your Mastodon instance. Mastodon holds keys for up to one hour (default: no idempotency key, which allows duplication).
idempotency_key.name: Idempotency key

language.description: The language of the post (default: Mastodon account preference).
language.name: Language

media.description: Attach an image or video to the post.
media.name: Media

media_description.description: If an image or video is attached, will add a description for this media for people with visual impairments.
media_description.name: Media description

media_warning.description: If an image or video is attached, will mark the media as sensitive (default: no media warning).
media_warning.name: Media warning

quote_approval_policy.description:
Who can quote this post (default: account setting).
Ignored if visibility is private or direct.
quote_approval_policy.name: Who can quote

visibility.description: The visibility of the post (default: account setting).
visibility.name: Visibility

post.name: Post

account_name.description: The Mastodon account username to unmute (e.g. @user@instance).
account_name.name: Account name

config_entry_id.description: Select the Mastodon instance to unmute this account on.
config_entry_id.name: Mastodon instance

update_profile.description: Updates your Mastodon profile information and pictures.

attribution_domains.description: Websites allowed to credit you. Protects from false attributions. Note that setting attribution domains will replace all existing attribution domains, not just the ones specified here.
attribution_domains.name: Attribution domains

avatar.description: An image to set as your profile picture. WEBP, PNG, or JPG. At most 8 MB. Will be downscaled to 400x400px.
avatar.name: Profile picture

bot.description: Signal to others that the account mainly performs automated actions.
bot.name: Automated account

config_entry_id.description: Select the Mastodon account to update the profile of.
config_entry_id.name: [%key:component::mastodon::services::post::fields::config_entry_id::name%]

discoverable.description: Whether your profile should be discoverable. Public posts and the profile may be featured or recommended across Mastodon.
discoverable.name: Discoverable

display_name.description: The display name to set on your profile.
display_name.name: Display name

fields.description: Additional profile fields as key-value pairs. Your homepage, pronouns, age, anything you want. Note that updating fields will replace all existing fields, not just the ones specified here.
fields.name: Extra fields

header.description: An image to set as your profile header. WEBP, PNG, or JPG. At most 8 MB. Will be downscaled to 1500x500px.
header.name: Header picture

locked.description: Whether to lock your profile. A locked profile requires you to approve followers and hides your posts from non-followers.
locked.name: Lock profile

note.description: The bio to set on your profile. You can @mention other people or #hashtags.
note.name: Bio

update_profile.name: Update profile
